title: Unbound: Lite
description: A project focusing on optimizing performance of Minecraft, both in Singleplayer and Multiplayer. This modpack offers a significant boost in framerate.
body:
# **Unbound: Lite**
## About Unbound
Unbound is a modpack collection I've made that's focused on making Minecraft feel fresh again, while also making it run like hot butter!

Check out my other Unbound modpacks below:


- ~~[Unbound: Core](https://modrinth.com/project/unbound-core)~~ _Coming soon_
- ~~[Unbound: Refined](https://modrinth.com/project/unbound-refined)~~ _Coming soon_
- [Unbound: Wynncraft](https://modrinth.com/project/unbound-wynncraft)

## Unmatched Performance
**Based on testing in various CPU and GPU intensive tests:**
| **Vanilla** | **Similar Modpacks** | **Unbound: Lite**  |
|:------------|:---------------------|:-------------------|
| **Avg FPS** | 1.2x – 2x            | 3x                 |
| **1% Lows** | 7x – 170x            | 310x               |

Significant speed up in world generation, chunk loading and server performance

This modpack also includes my custom built benchmarking map for anyone who wants to try!

### Issues?
Make sure you've allocated enough RAM to the game, I recommend using **4-8 GB (4096-8192 MB)** depending on your system specifications.

If you're experiencing crashes, try disabling "Distant Horizons" and/or "Palladium".
If you're still having issues try disabling "Get It Together, Drops!"\
**I highly encourage you to message me if you find any issues or solutions!**
